name: Additive activation/agitation risk
actions: Use caution when combining agents that can increase activation or agitation.
Monitor for restlessness, irritability, anxiety, agitation, or behavioral activation, especially after initiation or dose increases (educational).
If clinically significant activation occurs, consider dose reduction, timing changes, or regimen simplification (educational).

rationale: Both drugs can contribute to activation or agitation.
Combined effects may increase restlessness, irritability, anxiety, or behavioral activation.

explanation_template: {A_name} and {B_name} can both increase activation or agitation risk, which may be more noticeable when used together.
